final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing single-card educational knowledge card for children about the story of 赤壁之战 (Battle of Red Cliffs) from 三国.

Style/medium: needs a children's cartoon / illustrated storybook aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single large card layout with a clear title at top, key story bullet points listed with punctuation on the side, and a cartoon narrative illustration as the main body
Subject: must include the 赤壁之战 story from 三国, presented in a child-friendly way
Scene/backdrop: needs a 赤壁 river-battle atmosphere — exact scenic treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a lively and engaging children's-book atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a bright and vivid direction suitable for children — exact colors are yours
Materials/textures: needs a cartoon illustration surface treatment — exact rendering style is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "赤壁之战" as the main title; must include key story bullet points listed alongside the illustration (content: story highlights of 赤壁之战 in child-friendly Chinese)
Constraints: must preserve single-card format; title must be clearly legible; bullet points must be visually separated and punctuated; cartoon story illustration must be the dominant visual element
Avoid:
